home.introduction: AClimate is a platform that provides agro-climatic forecasts to farmers and extension agents to help them make informed farming decisions in the face of climate variability. The platform offers accurate and up-to-date information about expected seasonal climate conditions. This information then allows farmers to plan and prepare for the growing season ahead. By providing seasonal climate forecasts, AClimate aims to contribute to reducing the risks of agricultural systems. The platform is designed to be user-friendly and accessible, providing information to support decisions about planting, harvesting, and managing their crops. With its focus on providing seasonal climate forecasts, AClimate is helping to improve the resilience of farming systems in the countries where it is deployed.
home.seasonal-description: Seasonal weather forecasts give us probabilistic information about the categories - below normal, normal and above normal - in the next 6 months, determined this information can be obtained different scenarios on a daily basis, which serve as input to enter the crop models.
home.subseasonal-description: Subseasonal weather forecasts provide us with probabilistic information in categories - below normal, normal and above normal - for each week of a month.
home.climate-description: Climate scenarios are necessary in crop simulation processes. To obtain these scenarios, a statistical process called re-sampling is carried out.
home.crop-description: The process of simulating the behavior of a crop over a period of time is done by using climate scenarios and specific configuration files. For rice cultivation, the Oryza model is used, while for corn and wheat crops, the DSSAT models are used.
home.map-text: Come and explore the world of AClimate! Our innovative platform is changing the way farmers plan and prepare for the growing season ahead. And the best part? It's available in multiple countries, so no matter where you are, you can get information. Take a moment to check out our website and see if AClimate is operating in your country. We're constantly expanding, so you never know, we might be coming to your area soon.
home.bulletin-description: Do you need to create an agroclimatic bulletin? Our platform allows you to design, review, and export agroclimatic bulletins quickly, flexibly, and tailored to your context.

dataPolicy.title: Data policy
dataPolicy.subtitle: AClimate informed consent
dataPolicy.intro1: The International Center for Tropical Agriculture (CIAT), as part of the Alliance of Bioversity International and CIAT, is responsible for the AClimate platform, a digital tool that provides agroclimatic information to support decision-making for different stakeholders and users.
dataPolicy.intro2: Using AClimate involves the processing of personal data, which is required for the operation of the platform and to improve the services offered to producers, technicians, and other users in the agricultural sector. Below, we clearly and transparently explain how we use your information and request your authorization for it.

section1.title: 1. What information is collected?
section1.intro: When registering or interacting with the platform, AClimate collects:
section1.item4: Browsing information automatically generated through Google Analytics (for example: IP address, device type, approximate location, visited pages, and session duration).
section1.outro: No sensitive data or information related to personal decisions outside the use of the platform is requested or collected.

section2.title: 2. What are the data used for?
section2.intro: The information will be used exclusively to:
section2.item1: Create your account and allow access to AClimate features.
section2.item2: Send communications related to forecasts, bulletins, agroclimatic alerts, or other platform-related services.
section2.item3: Improve AClimate performance, security, and user experience through statistical analysis and browsing metrics.
section2.item4: Generate aggregated reports aimed at improving agroclimatic services and supporting agricultural decision-making.
section2.outro: Under no circumstances will your data be used for commercial purposes unrelated to the platform, nor will data be sold or transferred to third parties without your authorization. When it is necessary to share information with technical partners or technology service providers, this will be done under confidentiality agreements and only for the purposes described above.

section3.title: 3. Use of external tools
section3.body: AClimate uses Google Analytics and similar tools to understand platform usage and optimize operation. These tools may collect technical data through cookies or anonymous identifiers. You can manage cookie usage through your browser settings. The use of these tools is carried out according to applicable privacy policies.

section4.title: 4. Confidentiality and storage
section4.body: Your data will be treated confidentially by authorized staff of the Bioversity-CIAT Alliance. Information will be stored on secure servers and according to the Alliance's internal data protection policies. Information will only be reported in aggregated form; individual users will never be identified in analyses or derived products. Data will be kept only for the time necessary to fulfill the purposes described or as required by applicable regulations.

section5.title: 5. User rights
section5.item1: Request updates or corrections to your information.
section5.item2: Withdraw your consent and request deletion of your data, except where there is a legal obligation to retain it.
section5.item3: Ask how your data is being used.
section5.item4: Submit requests, complaints, or concerns about the handling of your information.
section5.contactIntro: To exercise these rights, you can write to:
section5.contactAddress: Address: Km 17, Cali-Palmira road, Valle del Cauca, Colombia

section6.title: 6. Voluntary nature
section6.body: Using AClimate and providing personal information is completely voluntary. If you choose not to provide certain data, some platform features may not be available. Withdrawal of consent will not affect prior and lawful data use carried out before your request.

section7.title: 7. Consent declaration
section7.intro: By accepting this informed consent within the AClimate platform, you declare that:
section7.item1: You have read and understood the information presented here.
section7.item2: You authorize the processing of your personal data for the purposes described.
section7.item3: You understand that you can withdraw your consent at any time through official channels.
